subject: docs(migration): add API migration plan — direct Supabase to tool-till-tees
body:
Document the plan to migrate all frontend data operations from direct
Supabase client calls to the tool-till-tees REST API. Keeps Supabase
for auth and realtime subscriptions only. Includes per-hook migration
mapping, endpoint reference, risks, and verification steps.

Tags: documentation, architecture, migration, planning
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: api-migration
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01G52a5oQY1JKzyjwx2t857e
